faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: We know you have questions, and we have answers. Below you will find responses to common inquiries about Tashafy.
faq.q1: Why should I choose Tashafy for my healthcare journey?
faq.a1: Tashafy offers a unique blend of intuitive design, customizable features, and trusted partner networks, distinguishing it for effective healthcare coordination.
faq.q2: Is Tashafy suitable for international patients?
faq.a2: Yes. Tashafy is designed to support medical travel and international patients with accredited centers and end-to-end coordination.
faq.q3: How quickly can I get started with Tashafy?
faq.a3: You can create an account and explore services within minutes. Our team is available to guide you through booking and next steps.
faq.q4: Can I import my medical records or history?
faq.a4: We work with our partner centers to ensure your relevant medical information is shared securely when you choose to proceed with a booking.
faq.q5: Are there resources or guides available for patients?
faq.a5: Yes. We provide guides, FAQs, and dedicated support to help you understand options and prepare for your care.
faq.q6: What level of customization does Tashafy offer?
faq.a6: Services can be tailored to your needs, from rehabilitation and wellness to specialized medical care, with flexible booking and support.
faq.q7: How often does Tashafy update its offerings?
faq.a7: We regularly add new partners, services, and features to give you the best choices and experience.

testimonials.title: Success stories and customer opinions
testimonials.subtitle: We highly value our patients' opinions and always strive to improve our services. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we are committed to listening to your feedback and meeting your health needs. Share your experiences with us to elevate the level of care we provide.
testimonials.items.0.name: Ahmed Fouad
testimonials.items.0.quote: An excellent experience by all measures. Easy booking and precise follow-up from the team. Personal and professional attention made the treatment journey comfortable and effective.
testimonials.items.1.name: Layla Khalid
testimonials.items.1.quote: The nutritionist was the epitome of knowledge and professionalism. A customized nutrition program helped me achieve my health goals in a sustainable way.
testimonials.items.2.name: Salem Abdullah
testimonials.items.2.quote: Amazing results after stem cell therapy. Significant improvement in my health and an overall feeling of energy and vitality. Thanks to the outstanding medical team.
testimonials.items.3.name: Noura Mohammed
testimonials.items.3.quote: My experience with cosmetic surgery was wonderful. The doctor was patient and understanding, and the results exceeded my expectations. I recommend it to anyone seeking excellence.
testimonials.items.4.name: Faisal Mahmoud
testimonials.items.4.quote: A comprehensive physical therapy program. Noticeable improvement in movement and reduced pain. The team was cooperative and friendly, making the experience very positive.
